docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,240.00 FILED BY LEVINE, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT GERVET, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM LEVINE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIC GERVERT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A DATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVINE, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GERVET, ERIC $7,090.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,165.00, (SEE SCANNED MC-025). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION CHANGE OF ADDRESS FOR DEFENDANT. FILED BY DEFENDANT GERVET, ERIC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GERVET, ERIC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-25-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GERVET, ERIC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVINE, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT GERVET, ERIC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2021 - JUDGMENT.
